title: MTR Yutong Retexture
body:
A Resource Pack that adds three buses to the MTR Mod

From left to right
- Yutong LHT
- London Enviro
- RXTransit Bus

Siding lengths are 10.0 or 11 blocks long for platforms

Credits to Yeche for the Original Yutong Model
AirFun for the London Retexture

Starting from 1.5 the buses in the depot menu can be easily found by typing a single _

Now included as a seperate standalone pack is the RHT version of the original Yutong. Its depot name is YUT_RHT.
